Course: 智能网联汽车概论

Task#7 course=体育 classes=[2025级智能轧钢技术1班,2025级智能轧钢技术2班,2025级钢铁智能冶金技术1班（高本贯通）,2025级钢铁智能冶金技术2班,2025级钢铁智能冶金技术3班,2025级机电一体化技术1班,2025级机电一体化技术2班,2025级机电一体化技术3班,2025级机电一体化技术4班,2025级汽车制造与试验技术1班,2025级汽车制造与试验技术2班,2025级智能网联汽车技术,2025级林业技术1班,2025级林业技术2班,2025级森林草原资源保护1班,2025级森林草原资源保护2班,2025级森林草原防火技术1班]

Task#101 course=智能汽车传感器技术 classes=[2025级汽车制造与试验技术1班]
Task#102 course=机械制图 classes=[2025级汽车制造与试验技术1班]

classificationPolicy.primaryHardSignalDescription: ClassGroup membership (TeachingTask.taskClasses[].classGroup.name) is the primary hard-rule signal. It determines whether a task is AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY, NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY, or MIXED.
classificationPolicy.auxiliarySignalDescription: Course.name and TeachingTask.remark are auxiliary. They can be recorded in detail messages for human review but CANNOT override the classGroup hard rule for HC6.

automotiveClassification.defaultRule: classGroup membership dominates. courseName / remark are auxiliary only and do not change HC6 hard rule.

linxiaoRoomClassification.defaultRule: strict keyword 林校 only, no single-character 林

correctionNote.issue: K22-F2 originally said "any single signal triggers automotive" and "any automotive classGroup triggers automotive" — both wrong. A mixed classGroup task (automotive + non-automotive students) should NOT be allowed in Linxiao, because non-automotive students are forbidden from Linxiao.
correctionNote.fix: K22-F2A unified the specialty classification into a 5-class scheme. classGroup membership dominates; courseName / remark are auxiliary only and cannot override HC6. MIXED classGroup in Linxiao now triggers HC6 hard penalty (-1000), not exempt.
correctionNote.nextStageImplGuidance: K22-F3-SPECIALTY-CAMPUS-WEEKEND-CONSTRAINT-IMPL must use the K22-F2A 5-class classification. Any future specialty modifications must preserve: (a) classGroup dominates, (b) MIXED in Linxiao triggers HC6, (c) courseName / remark are auxiliary only.

constraintDesign.name: 汽车专业学生优先林校教室 (Automotive prefers Linxiao)
constraintDesign.businessDescription: 汽车专业学生优先全放在林校的教室。
skipRules: Task without any automotive classification (classGroup, courseName, remark) — non-automotive
Room that is not Linxiao (cannot be moved to Linxiao by this rule)
LinXiao room unavailable for the slot (skip per RoomAvailability)
Task with no classGroup (no specialty signal — skip)
constraintDesign.rationale: “优先” 是 soft 偏好，不是绝对 hard。如果林校教室容量不足，solver 仍应能生成可行课表，因此不能用 hard。但偏好较强，penalty 应较高 (-20)，超过 SC1/SC2/SC4 任何一个。K22-F2 design 阶段建议 SC6。
constraintDesign.classification: regex-based: AUTOMOTIVE_KEYWORDS in ClassGroup.name OR Course.name OR TeachingTask.remark

constraintDesign.name: 非汽车专业学生不得进林校教室 (Non-automotive forbidden in Linxiao)
constraintDesign.businessDescription: 其他专业学生不得放到林校的教室。
skipRules: Task classified as automotive (any classification signal) — exempt
Mixed automotive + non-automotive task (合班) — should be treated as automotive or have manual override
Task with no classGroup (no signal) — skip to be safe (or treat as non-automotive)
Room that is not Linxiao — rule does not apply
constraintDesign.rationale: “不得” 是 hard 绝对禁止。与现有 HC1-HC5 同等约束级别 (-1000)。solver 必须保证可行性 — 如果林校教室不足以容纳所有非汽车任务，应 fail 早返回而不是生成违反排课。命名沿用 HC6 (HC6 在 score.ts 中是 skeleton, K22-A-E-2 提到该 skeleton 故意不计分; 此处 HC6_NON_AUTOMOTIVE_FORBID_LINXIAO 与原 HC6 是不同约束 id, 不冲突).但需要先 audit 汽车专业识别准确率, 如准确率不足, 应先做 mapping/audit, 不直接实现.
constraintDesign.classification: regex-based: non-automotive (after CONSTRAINT_A check) placed in Linxiao room → hard violation

constraintDesign.name: 周末一般不排课 (Weekend avoidance)
skipRules: task with manual weekend exception (would need new field, schema extension deferred to K22-H)
room that is "weekend-only" by design (no current data, future schema)
constraintDesign.rationale: “一般” 是 soft 偏好，不是 hard 禁止。dayOfWeek 6/7 表示周六/周日。当前数据中可能已有周末排课 (audit 后确认), solver 可能生成周末排课 (取决于 slot generation). soft penalty -15 让 solver 尽量避免周末, 但允许 manual override. K22-F2 阶段不修改 RoomAvailability / candidate slots 层.
constraintDesign.classification: dayOfWeek-based: dayOfWeek in [6, 7] → soft penalty per slot

mixedCaseDecisionTable.case: TeachingTask 同时关联汽车班 + 非汽车班 (合班)
mixedCaseDecisionTable.recommendation: K22-F2A correction: classify as MIXED. In Linxiao: trigger HC6 hard penalty (-1000) — the task has non-automotive students who are forbidden from Linxiao. Out of Linxiao: no penalty. If future manual exception is needed, add explicit override field (K22-H schema).
mixedCaseDecisionTable.reason: K22-F2 original said “any automotive classGroup triggers automotive” — this was WRONG. 合班 contains non-automotive students, who are forbidden to enter Linxiao. Treating mixed as automotive would let non-automotive students sneak into Linxiao. Conservative: hard rule dominates. Manual exception can be added in K22-H if 教务处 approves specific 合班 exemptions.

mixedCaseDecisionTable.case: 课程名含 “汽车” 但 classGroup 全是非汽车
mixedCaseDecisionTable.classification: NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY_WITH_AUX_FLAG (or just NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY with auxiliary flag recorded)
mixedCaseDecisionTable.recommendation: K22-F2A correction: classGroup dominates. Treat as NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY. In Linxiao: trigger HC6 hard penalty (-1000) — the non-automotive students must not enter Linxiao. Auxiliary flag (courseName or remark contains automotive keyword) can be recorded in detail message for human review, but does NOT change the HC6 hard rule.
mixedCaseDecisionTable.reason: K22-F2 original said “Any single signal triggers automotive” — this was WRONG. A non-automotive classGroup taking a course with “汽车” in the name (e.g. “汽车概论” public elective) still has non-automotive students. The classGroup signal is the primary hard-rule signal; courseName / remark are auxiliary and cannot override HC6.

mixedCaseDecisionTable.case: 班级名含 “汽车” 但课程是公共课 (e.g. 高等数学)
mixedCaseDecisionTable.recommendation: classGroup dominates. If all classGroups are automotive (e.g. 汽车检测1班), task is AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY regardless of courseName.
mixedCaseDecisionTable.reason: 汽车班学生选 公共课 在 林校 教室仍然合理. SC6 preference does not care about courseName, only about which students are taking it.

mixedCaseDecisionTable.case: 林校 room 识别不明确 (name 中含 “林” 但不是 “林校”)
mixedCaseDecisionTable.recommendation: Use strict keyword “林校” only. Single-character “林” too risky (could match unrelated names). Manual admin review of ambiguous rooms in K22-H admin UI extension.
mixedCaseDecisionTable.reason: 保守策略: 只匹配 “林校” (multi-char). Single “林” 风险高, 留作 K22-H schema extension (Room.campus field).

mixedCaseDecisionTable.recommendation: Skip automotive rules. Treat as non-automotive for HC6 (conservative: prefer fail than violate hard rule).
mixedCaseDecisionTable.reason: 无 classGroup signal, 无法判断 specialty. K22-F2 阶段假设保守地 treat as non-automotive. K22-H 阶段可加 schema 改进.

mixedCaseDecisionTable.case: 公共课 teachingTask 关联 multiple classGroups (其中一个是汽车)
mixedCaseDecisionTable.recommendation: K22-F2A correction: classify as MIXED, not as automotive. In Linxiao: trigger HC6 hard penalty (-1000). Out of Linxiao: no penalty. Same rule as case 1 (合班).
mixedCaseDecisionTable.reason: Mixed classGroup contains non-automotive students who are forbidden to enter Linxiao. Do NOT apply "any automotive classGroup triggers automotive" — that rule was wrong.

mixedCaseDecisionTable.case: TeachingTask 含 remark "汽车专业" 但 classGroup 不是汽车
mixedCaseDecisionTable.classification: NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY_WITH_REMARK_FLAG (or NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY with remark recorded for human review)
mixedCaseDecisionTable.recommendation: K22-F2A correction: classGroup dominates. Treat as NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY. In Linxiao: trigger HC6 hard penalty (-1000). Remark is auxiliary — record in detail message for human review but does NOT change HC6. If 教务处 explicitly approves an exception, add a manual override field (K22-H schema).
mixedCaseDecisionTable.reason: K22-F2 original said "Use remark signal: if remark contains automotive keyword, treat as automotive regardless of classGroup" — this was WRONG. Remark cannot override classGroup membership for the HC6 hard rule. A remark typo, stale text, or copy-paste error should NOT let a non-automotive task sneak into Linxiao.

fullScoreDesign.classification: K22-F2A 5-class classification: AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY / NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY / MIXED_AUTOMOTIVE_AND_NON_AUTOMOTIVE / NO_CLASSGROUP_AUX_AUTOMOTIVE_SIGNAL / UNKNOWN_NO_SIGNAL. classGroup membership is the primary hard-rule signal. courseName / remark are auxiliary only.

automotive.aggregation: For each slot, classify task into 5 classes. If AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY && !linxiao: SC6_AUTOMOTIVE_PREFERS_LINXIAO soft penalty = -20.
automotive.complexity: O(n) where n = number of slots
automotive.detailsEmitted: One SC6 detail per slot that violates preference

nonAutomotiveForbid.aggregation: For each slot, if classification is NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY or MIXED AND room IS Linxiao: HC6_NON_AUTOMOTIVE_FORBID_LINXIAO hard penalty = -1000. K22-F2A: MIXED in Linxiao also triggers HC6 (mixed has non-automotive students).

weekend.aggregation: For each slot, if dayOfWeek in [6, 7]: SC7_WEEKEND_AVOIDANCE soft penalty = -15. Independent of classification.
weekend.detailsEmitted: One SC7 detail per weekend slot

deltaScoreDesign.affectedSlots: Only the moved slot. Room and day change; all other slots unchanged.
deltaScoreDesign.procedure: For the moved slot, recompute isAutomotive (static, depends on task) and isLinxiao (depends on new room). Compare before (using old.roomId, old.dayOfWeek) and after (using move.newRoomId, move.newDay). Three contributions: SC6 (if automotive && !lx), HC6 (if !auto && lx), SC7 (if weekend).
deltaScoreDesign.formula:
deltaHard += (after_hardPenalty - before_hardPenalty)  // from HC6 only
deltaSoft += (after_softPenalty - before_softPenalty)  // from SC6 + SC7
deltaScoreDesign.hardScoreImpact: Only HC6 contributes to deltaHard. SC6 + SC7 are soft.
deltaScoreDesign.doesNotIterate: No need to scan all slots — only the moved slot.

harnessPlan.purpose: Automotive task in Linxiao room → no penalty
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=汽车检测, classes=[汽车检测1班]) in 1 Linxiao room (id=100, name=林校301).
harnessPlan.notes: Happy path. automotive && lx → no penalty.

harnessPlan.purpose: Automotive task in non-Linxiao room → soft penalty
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=汽车检测) in 1 non-Linxiao room (id=200, name=A101).
harnessPlan.notes: automotive && !lx → soft penalty -20. Note: SC6 is soft preference, not hard violation.

harnessPlan.purpose: Non-automotive task in Linxiao room → hard penalty
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=高等数学, classes=[计算机1班]) in 1 Linxiao room (id=100, name=林校301).
harnessPlan.notes: !automotive && lx → hard penalty -1000. Solver would never apply this if HC gate is enforced.

harnessPlan.purpose: Non-automotive task in non-Linxiao room → no penalty
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=高等数学) in 1 non-Linxiao room (id=200, name=A101).

harnessPlan.purpose: Automotive-only task in Linxiao room → no penalty
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=汽车检测, classes=[汽车检测1班]) in 1 Linxiao room (id=100, name=林校301).
harnessPlan.notes: Happy path. AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY && lx → no penalty. K22-F2A: classification is AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY because all classGroups are automotive.

harnessPlan.purpose: Automotive-only task in non-Linxiao room → soft penalty
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=汽车检测, classes=[汽车检测1班]) in 1 non-Linxiao room (id=200, name=A101).
harnessPlan.notes: AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY && !lx → soft penalty -20. SC6 is soft preference, not hard violation.

harnessPlan.purpose: Non-automotive-only task in Linxiao room → hard penalty
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=高等数学, classes=[计算机1班]) in 1 Linxiao room (id=100, name=林校301).
harnessPlan.notes: NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY && lx → hard penalty -1000. Solver would never apply this if HC gate is enforced.

harnessPlan.purpose: Non-automotive-only task in non-Linxiao room → no penalty
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=高等数学, classes=[计算机1班]) in 1 non-Linxiao room (id=200, name=A101).

harnessPlan.purpose: MIXED classGroup (automotive + non-automotive) in Linxiao → hard penalty (K22-F2A correction)
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=综合实践, classes=[汽车检测1班, 计算机1班]) in 1 Linxiao room (id=100).
harnessPlan.notes: K22-F2A: MIXED in Linxiao triggers HC6 (-1000). The mixed task has non-automotive students who are forbidden from Linxiao. K22-F2 originally said hard=0 (WRONG).

harnessPlan.purpose: MIXED classGroup in non-Linxiao room → no penalty
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=综合实践, classes=[汽车检测1班, 计算机1班]) in 1 non-Linxiao room (id=200).
harnessPlan.notes: MIXED && !lx → no penalty. Mixed task is allowed in non-Linxiao rooms.

harnessPlan.purpose: courseName has 汽车 but classGroup is non-automotive + in Linxiao → hard penalty (K22-F2A correction)
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=汽车概论, classes=[计算机1班]) in 1 Linxiao room. courseName has "汽车" but classGroup "计算机1班" is non-automotive.
harnessPlan.notes: K22-F2A: courseName / remark CANNOT override classGroup hard rule. Classification is NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY (with courseName recorded as auxiliary flag). Linxiao triggers HC6.

harnessPlan.purpose: remark has 汽车 but classGroup is non-automotive + in Linxiao → hard penalty (K22-F2A correction)
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=综合实践, remark="汽车专业", classes=[计算机1班]) in 1 Linxiao room.
harnessPlan.notes: K22-F2A: remark is auxiliary. Classification is NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY (with remark recorded as auxiliary flag). Linxiao triggers HC6. Remark typo / stale text / copy-paste must NOT let non-automotive task sneak into Linxiao.

harnessPlan.purpose: Automotive classGroup taking public course (高等数学) in non-Linxiao → soft penalty
harnessPlan.fixture: 1 task (id=1, course=高等数学, classes=[汽车检测1班]) in 1 non-Linxiao room.
harnessPlan.notes: classGroup dominates. AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY (all classGroups are automotive) regardless of courseName. Soft penalty SC6 for not in Linxiao.

harnessPlan.purpose: Move AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY task from non-Linxiao to Linxiao → soft improves
harnessPlan.fixture: AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY task in non-Linxiao room. Move to Linxiao room. beforeSoft=-20 (SC6), afterSoft=0, deltaSoft=+20.
harnessPlan.notes: Verify delta correctly reflects SC6 resolve.

harnessPlan.purpose: Move NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY task to Linxiao → hard violation introduced
harnessPlan.fixture: NON_AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY task in non-Linxiao room. Move to Linxiao. beforeHard=0, afterHard=-1000, deltaHard=-1000.
harnessPlan.notes: Verify delta correctly reflects HC6 introduction. Solver would never apply this if hard gate enforced.

harnessPlan.purpose: Move MIXED task to Linxiao → hard violation introduced (K22-F2A correction)
harnessPlan.fixture: MIXED task (classes=[汽车检测1班, 计算机1班]) in non-Linxiao room. Move to Linxiao. beforeHard=0, afterHard=-1000, deltaHard=-1000.
harnessPlan.notes: K22-F2A: MIXED in Linxiao triggers HC6. deltaHard=-1000.

harnessPlan.purpose: Move slot from weekday to weekend → soft penalty introduced
harnessPlan.fixture: Task in any room, dayOfWeek=3 → dayOfWeek=6. beforeSoft=0, afterSoft=-15, deltaSoft=-15.
harnessPlan.notes: Verify delta correctly reflects SC7 introduction.

findings.title: 汽车专业识别 — regex-based on ClassGroup.name / Course.name / TeachingTask.remark
evidence: Examples: ["2024级汽车制造与试验技术1班","2024级汽车制造与试验技术2班","2024级汽车制造与试验技术五年制","2025级智能网联汽车技术","2025级汽车制造与试验技术1班"]
Prisma schema: NO Department / major / specialty field. K22-F2 must use regex-based detection.
findings.risk: MEDIUM if data.automotiveClassGroups.count is 0: no automotive classification possible, CONSTRAINT_A/B design relies on this. LOW if at least some classes match.
findings.recommendation: regex-based detection is acceptable. Document in K22-F2 audit. K22-H may add Department schema.

findings.title: 林校教室识别 — regex-based on Room.name / Room.building
findings.currentStatus: Linxiao rooms via name: 10, via building: 0, total: 10
evidence: Python parser: r'林校\s*\d+' regex matches "林校305" pattern (scripts/parse_cell.py:9)
Prisma schema: Room.building is nullable. Room.campus does NOT exist. K22-F2 must use regex on name OR building.
findings.risk: NONE if Linxiao rooms > 0 (data is identifiable). MEDIUM if 0 Linxiao rooms → CONSTRAINT_A/B has no target set.
findings.recommendation: regex-based detection using keyword "林校" is acceptable. K22-H may add Room.campus field for explicit modeling.

findings.title: 周末排课当前分布 — 用于评估 SC7 影响
findings.risk: If weekend slots exist, they will all be penalized after SC7 impl. Solver may try to move them to weekdays but be constrained by HC1-HC5.
findings.recommendation: If weekend slots = 0, SC7 is effectively a no-op for current data. If > 0, plan gradual migration (manual slot review + future K22-F2 implementation will naturally resolve).

findings.title: Mixed/ambiguous case decision table — 7 cases covered
findings.currentStatus: 7 mixed/ambiguous cases designed: mixed classGroup, ambiguous course, ambiguous class, ambiguous room, no classGroup, multi-classGroup, ambiguous remark. All decisions documented.
evidence: Default rule: "any automotive signal triggers automotive classification" (simple and safe)
Default rule: "strict keyword 林校 only, no single-character 林" (avoid false matches)
findings.risk: LOW: decision table provides deterministic rules. Edge cases handled consistently.
findings.recommendation: Document decision table in K22-F2 implementation. Re-evaluate when K22-H schema extension adds Department / Room.campus.

findings.title: 3 constraints overall data readiness: READY
findings.currentStatus: CONSTRAINT_A (SC6 automotive prefers Linxiao): data ready. CONSTRAINT_B (HC6 non-automotive forbid Linxiao): data ready. CONSTRAINT_C (SC7 weekend avoidance): always data-ready (dayOfWeek field exists).
evidence: CONSTRAINT_B: 10 Linxiao rooms + 6 automotive class groups
findings.risk: LOW: all 3 constraints can be implemented with current data.
findings.recommendation: K22-F2 = design + data audit only. K22-F3 = implementation. K22-F3 may require: (1) data backfill for ambiguous automotive classGroups, (2) admin UI to mark Room.campus, (3) score.ts implementation.

findings.title: K22-F2A 修正 specialty 分类策略：classGroup membership 是 hard rule 主信号，courseName / remark 不能覆盖
findings.currentStatus: K22-F2 原始策略说"any single signal triggers automotive classification"和"any automotive classGroup triggers automotive" — 这两个规则都是错的，会让非汽车学生通过合班或非汽车班选修"汽车概论"等课程绕过 HC6 hard rule 进入林校教室。K22-F2A 修正为 5-class classification：classGroup membership 优先作为 hard rule 主信号，courseName / remark 只能作为辅助信号记录在 detail message 中用于人工 review，但不能改变 HC6。修正后的 MIXED in Linxiao case 期望 hard=-1000（之前是 hard=0）。
evidence: K22-F2 audit originally documented "Treat as automotive" for mixed case — K22-F2A corrected to MIXED → HC6 hard violation in Linxiao
K22-F2 audit originally said "Any single signal triggers automotive" — K22-F2A corrected to classGroup dominates
K22-F2 audit originally said "Use remark signal: if remark contains automotive keyword, treat as automotive regardless of classGroup" — K22-F2A corrected to remark is auxiliary only
Harness plan updated: MIXED-LINXIAO hard=-1000 (was 0), COURSE_NAME_AUTO-BUT-NON_AUTO_CLASS-LINXIAO hard=-1000, REMARK_AUTO-BUT-NON_AUTO_CLASS-LINXIAO hard=-1000
findings.risk: MEDIUM (pre-implementation): if K22-F3 implementation followed K22-F2 (uncorrected) classification, non-automotive students would enter Linxiao via mixed 合班 or non-auto elective of "汽车相关" courses, violating the business hard rule. The design has been corrected; K22-F3 must follow the corrected 5-class scheme.
findings.recommendation: K22-F3 must implement the K22-F2A 5-class classification. classGroup membership dominates; courseName / remark are auxiliary flags only. Mixed (含 non-automotive classGroup) in Linxiao triggers HC6 hard penalty. UNKNOWN/NO_CLASSGROUP cases are conservative — default to HC6 unless explicit override is added in K22-H schema.

scope: Extend K22-C regression harness with 10 cases (4 CONSTRAINT_A/B/C, 1 MIXED, 3 SC7, 3 DELTA)
Pre-step (K22-F2A): confirm automotive data accuracy with academic affairs (教务处)

notes: K22-F2 is a read-only design audit.
No Prisma writes, no score.ts changes, no schema changes.
The Department model from the initial migration was dropped in the current schema; K22-F2 uses regex-based detection.
Python parser has r"林校\s*\d+" regex (scripts/parse_cell.py:9), which can be reused for room classification.
All 3 constraints are designed to be implementable with current data (no schema changes), but data quality audit is recommended as a pre-step.
